title: Manipal University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Manipal University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manipal University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Manipal University:
Manipal University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
